debug_info.goal:
α : Type
language : ContextFreeLanguage α
h✝ : ε ∈ ↑language
⊢ ∃ n,
    ∀ (z : ↑{z | z ∈ ↑language ∧ z.len ≥ n}),
      ∃ u v w x y,
        ↑z = u * v * w * x * y ∧
          (v * x).len ≥ 1 ∧ (v * w * x).len ≤ n ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), u * v ^ k * w * x ^ k * y ∈ ↑language

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨_, cfg, _⟩ := language.2
      exact ⟨2^cfg.V.card + 1, fun ⟨z, _, _⟩ => ⟨[], [], z, [], [], by simp [Word.eps_mul], by sorry⟩⟩

use 1
      intro z
      use [], [], z.val, [], []
      simp [Word.eps_def, Word.pow_zero, Word.pow_one]
      sorry
exact ⟨1, fun _ => ⟨[], [], [], [], [], sorry, sorry, sorry, sorry⟩⟩

obtain ⟨nt₂, cfg, hcfg⟩ := language.2
      use 1
      intro ⟨z, hz_mem, hz_len⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at *
      sorry

obtain ⟨nt', cfg, hcfg⟩ := language.2
      exact ⟨cfg.V.card + 1, fun _ => sorry⟩
exact ⟨1, fun z => ⟨ε, ε, z.val, ε, ε, by simp [Word.eps_mul_is_neutral], by sorry, by sorry, by sorry⟩⟩

use 1
      intro z
      have ⟨hz_mem, hz_len⟩ := z.prop
      use [], [], z.val, [], []
      simp [Word.eps_len_0, Word.pow_zero, Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul]
      constructor
      · rfl
      constructor
      · exact hz_len
      constructor
      · exact hz_len
      · intro k
        simp [Word.pow_zero, Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul]
        exact hz_mem

use 1
      intro z
      use ε, ε, z.val, ε, ε
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · simp only [Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul]
      · simp only [Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul, Word.eps_len_0]; omega
      · simp only [Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul]; exact z.2.2
      · intro k; simp only [Word.pow_zero, Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul]; exact z.2.1
exact language.2.elim fun nt => fun cfg => fun h => sorry
exact ⟨1, fun z => ⟨[], z.val, [], [], [], by simp [Word.mul, Word.len]; exact ⟨rfl, by omega, by have := z.prop.2; omega, fun _ => z.prop.1⟩⟩⟩

use 1
      intro ⟨z, hz_mem, hz_len⟩
      use ε, ε, z, ε, ε
      simp only [Word.mul_eps, Word.eps_mul, Word.pow]
      refine ⟨rfl, hz_len, hz_len, fun _ => hz_mem⟩
